publicationStmt.p: Transcribed from Bodleian Library, Lovelace Byron collection, Box 166, folios 188-189. Transcription by Lisa Gold (2022). TEI conversion for Sextant pipeline, 2026.

div.p: Much more comfortable. And even if only temporary, this is a .
I shall of course write tomorrow night, & I suppose you will send over for it early on Mondy afternoon.
very quiet, powerful, tall man. He hopes to succeed--
I have really [entire line too faint to read] [most of line too faint to read] I value one 1/2 hour of quiet.
